template.subject: Welcome to Men's Wellness Centers.
template.body: Thanks for reaching out, {{contact.first_name}}. A Men's Wellness Centers team member will call you within one business hour to schedule your {{ custom_values.consult_descriptor }} at your local clinic. BUILD DECISION NEEDED: paste final approved welcome copy.

Hi {{contact.first_name}}, this is Men's Wellness Centers. Thanks for reaching out. What is the best time today for a quick call to book your {{ custom_values.consult_descriptor }}? {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, following up from Men's Wellness Centers. Ready to book your {{ custom_values.consult_descriptor }}? Reply with a day that works. {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
{{contact.first_name}}, we will step back for now. When you are ready to book your consultation at Men's Wellness Centers, we are here. {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
You are booked, {{contact.first_name}}. Your 60-minute in-person consultation at Men's Wellness Centers is {{appointment.start_time}}. {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
Good morning {{contact.first_name}}. We look forward to seeing you today at {{appointment.start_time}} for your 60-minute in-person consultation at Men's Wellness Centers.

{{contact.first_name}}, to make the most of your 60-minute in-person consultation at Men's Wellness Centers, please complete your intake form here: {{custom_values.intake_link}}. {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
{{contact.first_name}}, it means a lot to hear your visit went well. Would you share a quick review of Men's Wellness Centers? {{contact.current_review_link}} {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
{{contact.first_name}}, no pressure at all. If any questions came up after your consultation at Men's Wellness Centers, I am here to help. {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
{{contact.first_name}}, we missed you today at Men's Wellness Centers. Let us get you rescheduled for your 60-minute in-person consultation. What day works? {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
{{contact.first_name}}, your Men's Wellness Centers program renews in 7 days. Reply here to confirm and we will take care of the rest. {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
{{contact.first_name}}, how was your visit to Men's Wellness Centers? One quick tap: {{custom_values.survey_link}} {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}

{{contact.first_name}}, know a man who could use his edge back? Refer him to Men's Wellness Centers and we will take care of you both. {{custom_values.referral_link}} {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, you were referred to Men's Wellness Centers. We would love to book your {{ custom_values.consult_descriptor }}. What day works? {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}

Sorry we missed your call to Men's Wellness Centers, {{contact.first_name}}. How can we help? You can book your {{ custom_values.consult_descriptor }} here: {{contact.current_booking_url}} {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
